title: Support unpacked array parameters in functions with complex assign

features.name: unpacked array parameter in function
features.description: Code should include a localparam with unpacked array dimension used inside a function

features.name: multi-dimensional unpacked array parameter
features.description: Code should include a multi-dimensional unpacked array parameter used in a function

features.name: complex assign to unpacked array in function
features.description: Code should include complex assignment with '{} syntax to an unpacked array parameter inside a function
